positive: A minimalist, sophisticated depiction of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The sky is a gradient blend of deep indigo, warm lavender, and burnt orange, casting dramatic long shadows. The foreground features clean, abstract geometric mountain peaks rendered in solid matte black. The overall composition is highly symmetrical and centered, emphasizing strong negative space and clean, crisp edges. Studio illustration style, vector art quality, high contrast, graphic novel aesthetic. Perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, text, logo, gradient shading on peaks, messy, low contrast, dirty, smudges, artifacts, multiple subjects, people, cartoon, realism
